[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001011010 4
1 0110000000 2
2 1000100000 2
3 0010000000 1
4 0110100101 5
5 1001111001 6
6 0100011111 6
7 0101001010 4

01 0100000000 1
12 0000000011 2
23 0111000000 3
34 1000111111 7
45 0000000000 a
56 0110000100 3
67 1001100000 3
70 0000010101 3

13 0001000000 1

35 1000011010 4
46 0010000000 1 match 3
57 0010100000 2
60 1000110001 4
71 0100000100 2

03 0101000000 2

50 0010100101 4
61 1000100000 2 match 2
72 0000000111 3

04 0101001010 4 match 7
15 0001011010 4 match 0

37 1000100000 2 match 2
40 0010000000 1 match 3
51 0110100100 4

73 0100000000 1
